positive: A stylized, abstract celestial body – a luminous crescent moon nestled among glowing cosmic dust and swirling nebulae. The aesthetic should be deep space art meets Art Nouveau elegance. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes of various stellar shapes and minimalist, flowing organic elements that resemble smoke or liquid light. Use a rich color palette of indigo, sapphire blue, silver, and hints of ethereal lavender. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a repeating, print-friendly pattern. Lighting should be dramatic and internal, giving the scene a glow without harsh shadows. Minimalistic design, high contrast, intricate detail.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, words, letters, copyright, noisy, blur, bokeh, artifacts, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres
